title: Where is my mind?
lyrics: [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] With your feet in the air and your head on the ground [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] Try this trick and spin it, yeah [E] [C#m] Your head will collapse [G#] If there's nothing in it [A] And you'll ask yourself [E] [C#m] Where is my mind? [G#] [A] Where is my mind? [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] Where is my mind? [E] [G#] [A] [Am] [C#m] [H] Way out in the water, see it swimming [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] I was swimmin' in the Caribbean [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] Animals were hiding behind the rock [E] [C#m] Except the little fish [G#] Bumped into me, I swear he was [A] Tryin' to talk to me, coy koi [E] [C#m] Where is my mind? [G#] [A] Where is my mind? [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] Where is my mind? [E] [G#] [A] [Am] [C#m] [H] Way out in the water, see it swimming [Verse 3] [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] With your feet in the air and your head on the ground [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] Try this trick and spin it, yeah [E] [C#m] Your head will collapse [G#] If there's nothing in it [A] And you'll ask yourself [E] [C#m] Where is my mind? [G#] [A] Where is my mind? [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] Where is my mind? [E] [G#] [A] [Am] [C#m] [H] Way out in the water, see it swimming [Outro] [E] [C#m] [G#] [A] x5 [E] [C#m] [G#]
